description: An automated patcher that applies obra/superpowers skill collection (brainstorming, TDD, systematic-debugging, subagent-driven development, and more) to OpenCode with role-aware subagent routing. Unlike the upstream package, this port patches the skill templates so dispatched tasks go to named agents (@implementer, @code-reviewer) instead of a generic general-purpose agent — letting you pin cheap fast models for coding grunt-work and expensive models for architecture and review via opencode.json agent config.
